testcase.name: Login › TS01 - should log in successfully with next redirect and greeting
Login › TS02 - should display error for invalid credentials
Login › TS03 - should validate required fields
Login › TS04 - should show validation when password is blank
Login › TS05 - should show validation when email is blank
Login › TS06 - should keep authenticated state after reload
Security / Access Control › SE01 - Não logado tentando fazer checkout deve redirecionar para login
Security / Access Control › SE02 - Tentar acessar a página de confirmação (/thank-you) diretamente sem estar logado deve redirecionar
Security / Access Control › SE03 - Should revoke protected access after logout
